name: Bison Wallet
description: Multi-asset cryptocurrency wallet with integrated DEX
compose:
name: slashnode-dcrdex
services:
  web:
    image: decred/dcrdex:v1.0.5
    container_name: dcrdex
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    entrypoint:
      - /bin/sh
      - '-c'
      - exec ./bisonw --webaddr $(hostname -I|cut -d\  -f1 ):5758
    volumes:
      - web_data:/dex/.dexc
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:5758:5758
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data:
    name: slashnode-dcrdex_web_data
